purpose: Select the next safe dry-run or review action from Failure Context Resolver output without mutating source, data, media, workers, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.

rerun_classifier.meaning: Re-run resource classification after input, registry, or routing-rule changes.

rerun_gate_plan.meaning: Re-run gate planning after classifier or policy update.

update_resource_registry.recommended_command: registry/routing-rule update dry-run required before mutation
update_resource_registry.meaning: Update Cloudflare Resource Registry or routing rules before retry.

run_review_gate.meaning: Send task to review-required gate before any mutation.

request_authorized_context.meaning: Stop until an authorized intent context exists.

fix_failed_step.recommended_command: inspect failed report and rerun failing dry-run step
fix_failed_step.meaning: Fix the reported failing step before continuing.

triage_unknown_state.recommended_command: triage unknown or future state before continuing
triage_unknown_state.meaning: Unknown/future states must not continue automatically.

hard_rules: Dispatcher must not execute mutation actions.
Unknown next_action_family must default to triage_unknown_state and do_not_mutate.
Priority order is policy guidance, not exhaustive hardcoded truth.
Real mutation, deploy, rollback, and production recovery require separate rehearsals.
